title: HTS Diverter Valve Compatible with Worcester Greenstar RD 430i 532 532i 537i 542i & HE Plus FSN 7-28KW & 11-35KW 3 Way Diverter Valve 87170100620
features: Wide Compatibility: Designed for use with Worcester Greenstar RD 430i, 532, 532i, 537i, 542i, and HE Plus FSN 7-28KW and 11-35KW models. Compatible with part number 87170100620, it’s a direct replacement for these models.

Efficient Water Flow Control: This 3-way diverter valve directs water flow to either the heating system or hot water circuit, ensuring seamless operation and maintaining the comfort and efficiency of your heating system.
Durable Construction: Built with robust, high-quality materials to withstand the high pressures and temperatures of a modern heating system, offering long-lasting reliability and performance.
Improved Heating Efficiency: Ensures the proper distribution of water throughout the system, which can enhance the efficiency and reliability of your heating and hot water system.
Easy to Install: Designed for straightforward installation, allowing you to quickly replace the existing diverter valve, minimizing downtime and disruption to your heating system.
12-Month Warranty: Includes a 12-month warranty, giving you peace of mind with your purchase and ensuring quality and durability.
description: HTS Diverter Valve Compatible with Worcester Greenstar RD 430i, 532, 532i, 537i, 542i & HE Plus FSN 7-28KW & 11-35KW - Part Number: 87170100620 The HTS Diverter Valve is a high-quality replacement part designed to be compatible with various Worcester Greenstar RD and HE Plus FSN models, including RD 430i, 532, 532i, 537i, 542i, as well as the HE Plus FSN 7-28KW and 11-35KW. This 3-way diverter valve plays a crucial role in directing the flow of water between the heating and hot water circuits, ensuring optimal performance and efficiency.
